title: senecio saussureoides
intro: Senecio saussureoides, also known as the "Blue Spur Geranium", is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting digestive health, among others. In herbal preparations, Senecio saussureoides is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
